properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 48/25
 1. ANDOEYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATIONS FROM 06 MAY TO 11 MAY DAILY FROM 1800-0200 UTC. MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA;

 A. 69-09.54N 015-46.26E
 B. 69-14.28N 015-44.52E
 C. 69-38.04N 016-56.88E
 D. 70-06.30N 015-51.24E
 E. 70-17.70N 014-03.84E
 F. 69-34.38N 013-06.60E
 G. 69-01.68N 014-09.48E
 H. 69-02.64N 015-31.68E

 2. FOR COORDINATION, ANDOEYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON. TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 / +47 76 14 45 87 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16 (CALLSIGN “ANDOEYA SPACE”). E-MAIL MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO.
 3. FOR FURTHER DETAILS SEE NOTICES TO MARINERS 08/2025  WWW.KARTVERKET.NO/EN/AT-SEA/EFS AND  WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO FOR DAILY UPDATES AND MAPS.
 4. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 44/25
